## Source: ossf-package-analysis (4b0ff124956b3356a75ab19d9e7f2bddfa64f0afa017c20f34899c963fbb6be0)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 's4-client' @ 1.2.1.r10ab0de (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
